questions.q: What is the primary mechanism by which soluble fiber helps reduce LDL cholesterol levels in the bloodstream?

It accelerates the metabolism of triglycerides in adipose tissue

questions.q: What is the relationship between glycemic index and glycemic load, and how do they differ in their nutritional application?

They are identical measures used interchangeably by nutritionists

questions.q: Which fat-soluble vitamin's absorption is significantly impaired in individuals with cystic fibrosis, and why?
